backend/main.mo: Defines the backend actor with strict legacy API/type compatibility and public types for user profiles, vaults, strategies, licenses, and related domain structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a codebase restoration feature and listing affected files, components, tests, and confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of numerous frontend files describing their purpose and functionality across authentication, UI, hooks, utilities, and styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global style definitions providing color tokens, theming variables, and dark mode overrides.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell loading the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed backend implementation checklist covering documentation, type system extensions, trade structures, and backward compatibility requirements.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Execution plan for roadmap phases 3–8 defining immutable constraints, backend rules, and step-by-step frontend/backend tasks.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication flow, minimal landing screen, profile setup gating, and app shell rendering.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component managing login/logout via Internet Identity with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal form that collects a user display name and optional account ID, then saves the profile using a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Displays an access-denied alert indicating the user lacks required admin permissions.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: Provides a context-based toast system with auto‑dismissing success, error, and info notifications.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: Fetches and displays recent audit log entries in a scrolling table with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Renders the main header with navigation buttons, current user name, and login controls.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Shows an equity curve chart using Recharts with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Maintains and displays live terminal-style logs and allows triggering a connectivity test.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Duplicate terminal-style logging component that pings bot status and supports connectivity testing.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Displays an equity curve chart using fetched telemetry data with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows bot heartbeat status, license state, cycles, and last ping with live indicators.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Renders uplink status with animated visuals and a toggle to enable or disable bot uplink.
Main app container managing navigation between dashboard and settings with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Provides bot connection status and opens a wizard to configure keys and bot URL.
Multi-step modal to generate keys, link public key, set bot URL, and finalize bot setup.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Empty placeholder file for profile settings UI.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Displays subscription tiers with pricing, features, and highlighting for the popular plan.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to user identity and refreshes dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides React Query hooks for admin checks and license management using the actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Fetches audit log entries with periodic refresh using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Retrieves and updates the caller’s user profile via actor-backed queries and mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Builds an equity curve from paginated trades for the current user.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Runs a signal-fetch test mutation and displays success or error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Queries heartbeat data for a given account with periodic polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth context, loading, login, and identity management.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Fetches the caller’s license status through the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Mutation hook to register a bot’s public key and refresh related queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Fetches live trade logs for the current user with periodic refresh.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfileSettings.ts: Empty placeholder file for future profile settings hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Mutation to set and validate a bot URL, with toast feedback and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Fetches paginated trades for an account using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Provides hooks for fetching bot profile and toggling uplink connectivity.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and custom theme variables for the UI.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility for merging Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin interface for managing licenses with UI controls and actor mutations.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Displays the dashboard layout composed of uplink, live logs, performance, and audit panels.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays the user's license and account status with loading, missing, and active/inactive states.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsRouteScreen: Empty file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Renders settings tabs allowing users to configure bot connection and subscription options.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Shows paginated and filterable trade history with account and date filters.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes backend errors into short user‑friendly messages with pattern detection.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides hex-string and byte-array conversion utilities.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps and computes PnL for trades.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, color tokens, fonts, and plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing architecture, requirements, and restoration tasks for Version 33.
